product_results.title: LARNMERN Men's Non Slip Shoes Work Food Service Kitchen Chef Slip Resistant Sole Cushion Slip on Restaurant Walking Footwear Waterproof Women

summary.text: These shoes offer super comfort with feet and back not hurting during wear. Customers describe them as great shoes with good quality. The appearance receives positive feedback from users. However, customers have mixed opinions on traction, water resistance, fit, size, and versatility.

authors_reviews.title: Love them
authors_reviews.text: My son loves them. They are so comfortable for being on his feet all day at work. His only complaint was that they squeaked when he walked.
authors_reviews.author: BAM

authors_reviews.title: Good quality - better for narrow feet
authors_reviews.text: Good quality - better for narrow feet. These are my daily shows and they are definitely narrow in the toes. My feet had to get used to them and develop a callous, but they still fit great otherwise.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Product was okay
authors_reviews.text: Initially, it felt very uncomfortable to wear but it was too late for me to return. I wore them to work but had to switch to another pair of shoes in the first hour because it just hurt my feet.After that, I put some softer insoles to make them comfortable and it was fine. I was able to walk for longer periods in them.I brought these for travel in Asia in July because it was advertised as a waterproof shoe and it gets rainy there.It withstood the water for a short time but after a while it got soaked through. Luckily I was able to dry it in my family's home there. So it wasn't as water proof as I thought it would be.
authors_reviews.author: D

authors_reviews.title: Not slip ons
authors_reviews.text: These are not slip ons. They have laced to be tied. Not what I was expecting.
authors_reviews.author: Cassandra

authors_reviews.title: Not slip ons
authors_reviews.text: Don't be fooled by the commercial or the ad that comes along with this pair of shoes. They are not slip ons. They look like good quality, but they do not work. They are laced, and you have to tie them app every time.To be honest with you, I think that they fit me kind of tight.Two stars and I returned them as well
authors_reviews.author: Cobrafan
